raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Role anchor","name":"What's feeling solid in your role right now, and what's stretching you?","description":"Identifies areas of confidence and areas where Sarah feels challenged.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Current impact","name":"Where do you believe your strategic impact is most visible in your current role?","description":"Assesses how Sarah perceives her own strategic contributions.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Future scope","name":"What kind of design work would make the next step toward Head of UX feel real for you?","description":"Explores the type of work Sarah believes will prepare her for a Head of UX role.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Cross-functional trust","name":"How do you see your current relationships with cross-functional leaders evolving as you move towards a Head role?","description":"Explores Sarah's view on building cross-functional relationships needed for a leadership role.","purpose":"competency","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Skill gap identification","name":"What specific skills do you feel need strengthening to prepare for a Head of UX role?","description":"Identifies skills Sarah feels are necessary for her career progression.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Delegation challenge","name":"What part of delegation feels most challenging as you step into more leadership responsibilities?","description":"Surfaces difficulties Sarah might be facing with delegation as a leadership skill.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Investment in skills","name":"What kind of support or resources would accelerate your development towards the Head of UX role?","description":"Explores what Sarah needs from the organization or the manager to support her growth.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Trade-off awareness","name":"What would you need to deprioritize to make space for the growth you're aiming for?","description":"Identifies what Sarah may need to let go of to focus on her growth.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Commitment to action","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Drives commitment to a specific action item before the next meeting.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
